response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Full Stack Developer with over 10 years of hands-on development across diverse technologies, including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB. Her background includes building scalable systems, optimizing performance, and contributing to AI-agent infrastructure, which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, her primary focus on Dlang, Ember.js, and Swift may require a short adjustment period for the core stack (Nest.js, Vitest). Her strong problem-solving skills, architecture expertise, and collaborative approach make her a strong candidate.
strengths: Deep expertise in full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven experience in scaling applications and optimizing performance
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and modern development practices
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary backend framework in the role)
Primary focus on Dlang and Ember.js may require time to adapt to the preferred stack
Less explicit experience with Vitest (testing framework) compared to Jest/Playwright
